roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPP TO PC995 MOTION FILED
MOT TO SET ASIDE INFO (PC 995) FILED
DEFT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE PRELIMINARY HEARING FILED

/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/GRTD:AS TO COUNT(S)3 THRU 9  /TEXT/VD:03-10-10 & 03-26-10 ON THIS CASE NUMBER 2433742/X:CASE CONTINUED FOR PRETRIAL ON COUNTS 1 & 2 IN CASE NUMBER 2433739/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN SHANTAE WILLIAMS AND DANIEL GIBBS/EXHMA:1- TWO PHOTOS OF SHOTGUN WITH RED BAG; 2- TWO PHOTOS OF SHOTGUN; A- TWO PHOTOS OF A BLACK BAG ON A CHAIR; 3- PHOTO OF A RIFLE; 4- PHOTO OF A RIFLE;B THRU F- PHOTOS/X:THE COURT AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE LANGUAGE- THE DATE ON OR ABOUT APRIL 30TH/HTA1:1, 5, 6/871D:2, 3, 4, 7/X:COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION OF THE PRIOR CONVICTION TO BE TRUE,/BAIL:200,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:CHERYL RICH       /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD:10-26-09/CONTD:TO JOIN NWH 2433739 & POSS DA MTR FILING OF2322746/
